items.title: Zeke Nnaji, who the Nuggets drafted in 2020, is only 18 months older than Bryce Hopkins, who Denver just drafted tonight.
items.author: Jake Shapiro
items.body_excerpt:
Zeke Nnaji, who the Nuggets drafted in 2020, is only 18 months older than Bryce Hopkins, who Denver just drafted tonight.

I like the Nuggets picks, just pointing that out.

media.title: Nuggets draft Brazile and Hopkins, bet on athleticism, experience – Denver Sports
media.description: The Nuggets did check off a couple of needs in drafting Arkansas forward Trevon Brazile: athleticism and forward depth
